---
name: "test"
description: "Run tests from a task file with todo -> in-progress -> done lifecycle."
argument-hint: "todoFile=<path> testScope=unit|e2e|all"
agent: "agent"
---

Use @.ai/commands/test.md as the canonical command definition.
Follow it exactly.
Treat the text supplied by the user when invoking this prompt as the command input.
